candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for ACT.
Current asset by classification under IFRS, but only a component and not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Appears equivalent here, but 'Cash and Cash Equivalents' is the cleaner standard label.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Priority given to the standard balance-sheet cash line; second label appears synonymous in this dataset.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line; exact match for LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt and candidate-listed; fits STD definition and excludes leases.
Likely current debt in the current liabilities section and excludes lease liabilities, but the same label also appears in non-current liabilities, creating ambiguity.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit current maturity debt line because the balance sheet contains duplicate 'Financial Liabilities' labels in both current and non-current sections, which is more ambiguous. Lease rows were excluded per rule.

candidates.why: Direct current tax payable/current tax liabilities line; best match for TXP.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this exact balance-sheet label is a confident match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct PPE line on the balance sheet; best match and preferable to gross or accumulated components.
Gross PPE, but total/net reported line exists and is preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the reported PPE line rather than gross/accumulated components.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for AT.
Balances to total assets but is not the assets-side label and should not be preferred.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this is the explicit total assets label.

candidates.why: Direct operating cash flow total on the cash flow statement; exact match for OANCF.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit operating cash flow total.
